stemHtml: When should words be spelt out according to the Radiotelephony Spelling Alphabet in a radio transmission?

options.a: When the crew is unfamiliar with the area.
options.b: Any time it is a call sign or instruction to proceed directly to the specified waypoint.
options.c: If the spelling of proper names, service abbreviations, and words is doubtful.
options.d: Any time it is a waypoint or VOR.
